message:
feat: Add proper function stubs for _testinternalcapi with comptime platform detection

- SIZEOF_TIME_T uses comptime to return correct value per platform:
  - Windows: 8 bytes (64-bit)
  - 32-bit Unix (x86/arm): 4 bytes
  - 64-bit Unix: 8 bytes
- All _PyTime_* functions now accept arguments via h.wrap()
- Functions return stub values (0, empty structs) for testing

files.patch:
@@ -4,4 +4,27 @@ const h = @import("mod_helper.zig");
 pub const Funcs = std.StaticStringMap(h.H).initComptime(.{
     .{ "get_configs", h.c(".{}") },
     .{ "get_recursion_depth", h.c("@as(i64, 1000)") },
+
+    // Time functions for test_time.py - use comptime for platform-specific values
+    .{ "SIZEOF_TIME_T", h.c(blk: {
+        const builtin = @import("builtin");
+        // time_t size varies by platform: 32-bit on 32-bit systems, 64-bit elsewhere
+        break :blk if (builtin.os.tag == .windows)
+            "@as(i64, 8)" // Windows: always 64-bit time_t
+        else if (builtin.cpu.arch == .x86 or builtin.cpu.arch == .arm)
+            "@as(i64, 4)" // 32-bit Unix: 32-bit time_t
+        else
+            "@as(i64, 8)"; // 64-bit Unix: 64-bit time_t
+    }) },
+    .{ "_PyTime_FromSeconds", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk @as(i64, 0); }", "@as(i64, 0)") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_FromSecondsObject", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk @as(i64, 0); }", "@as(i64, 0)") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsTimeval", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsTimespec", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsTimeval_clamp", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsTimespec_clamp", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsMilliseconds", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk @as(i64, 0); }", "@as(i64, 0)") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_AsMicroseconds", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk @as(i64, 0); }", "@as(i64, 0)") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_ObjectToTime_t", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk @as(i64, 0); }", "@as(i64, 0)") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_ObjectToTimeval", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_usec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
+    .{ "_PyTime_ObjectToTimespec", h.wrap("blk: { _ = ", "; break :blk .{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }; }", ".{ .tv_sec = @as(i64, 0), .tv_nsec = @as(i64, 0) }") },
 });
